ddls:
CREATE TABLE "snow_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date_ymd" TEXT /* Date of the data collection in YYYYMMDD format */,
  "local_id" TEXT /* Local identifier of the site */,
  "local_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where the data was collected */,
  "swe_mean_in" REAL /* Mean Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) in inches */,
  "swe_mean_mm" REAL /* Mean Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) in millimeters */,
  "effective_area_sqmi" REAL /* Effective area of the site in square miles */,
  "swe_volume_acft" REAL /* Volume of Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) in acre-feet */,
  "swe_volume_1week_change_acft" REAL /* Change in Volume of Snow Water Equivalent (SWE) over the past week in acre-feet */,
  "snow_cover_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the area covered by snow */,
  "updated_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  "swe_depth_inches" REAL /* Depth of snow in inches */,
  "swe_depth_mm" REAL /* Depth of snow in millimeters */,
  "precipitation_inches" REAL /* Daily precipitation in inches */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Daily precipitation in millimeters */,
  "temperature_celsius" REAL /* Average temperature in Celsius */,
  "temperature_fahrenheit" REAL /* Average temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Average wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_speed_kph" REAL /* Average wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "cloud_cover_percent" REAL /* Cloud cover as a percentage */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Data quality flag (e.g., 'good', 'suspect', 'bad') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snow_data_local_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_id") REFERENCES locations ("local_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "local_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "local_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation_ft" REAL /* Elevation of the location in feet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation_meters" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the monitoring station */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., 'mountain', 'valley', 'plain') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_aggregated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type is aggregated */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data type (e.g., 'satellite', 'ground_station') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'suspended') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES snow_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., 'csv', 'json', 'xlsx') */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES snow_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the metadata belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection */,
  "quality_assurance" TEXT /* Quality assurance measures taken */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was last updated */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Description of the data reliability (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES snow_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., 'draft', 'published', 'archived') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES snow_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly') */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., 'pdf', 'docx', 'xlsx') */,
  "report_size_mb" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "report_distribution_list" TEXT /* List of users or email addresses to whom the report should be distributed */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., 'draft', 'final', 'archived') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES snow_data ("data_id")
)
